headline: Builders FirstSource, Inc. (BLDR) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
summary: Builders FirstSource (BLDR) has received quite a bit of attention from Zacks.com users lately. Therefore, it is wise to be aware of the facts that can impact the stock's prospects.

headline: 3 Cash-Producing Stocks We’re Skeptical Of
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.
